title: medicago nigra
intro: Medicago nigra, also known as black medick, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving cognitive function. Medicago nigra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
